calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-4'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 664.6, and enter judgment pursuant to conditional stipulated" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
